query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A person with long center-parted hair photographed against a pale featureless background, their hands raised near their chest with fingers partially visible, the image capturing the subject from the upper torso upward with soft indistinct edges merging into the surrounding light.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred figure with long center-parted hair dissolving into ghostly abstraction against an overexposed white void, hands raised near the chest as indistinct smears, the subject's face rendered as a dark mournful mask with barely visible features, the entire image crushed into muted blue-gray monochrome with blown-out highlights swallowing detail and severe underexposure in the hair creating an oppressive melancholic atmosphere through deliberate technical degradation.
